stemHtml:
Which of these statements are correct or incorrect about the principle of operation of a reaction-type turbine stage?

1) Reaction turbine blades cause the turbine stage to rotate due to the aerodynamic action of the airstream directed to flow past the blade at a particular angle
2) In a reaction-type turbine stage, both the blades of the stator and the rotor are acting on the aerodynamic principle of an airfoil
